headline: Mixed Investor Sentiment on Capital One Financial (COF), While Management Remains Confident
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) stands among the 11 best very cheap stocks to buy according to billionaires. With over 75% of covering analysts maintaining bullish ratings and a consensus price target of $275.00 (48.75% upside), investor opinion toward Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) remains positive, as evidenced by its outperformance relative to the industry […]
